en.name: Battleship
en.desc: Naval warfare strategy! Place your fleet and guess enemy positions. First to sink all opponent ships wins. The classic guessing game with a military twist!
en.howToPlay: First place your ships on your board (click to place, button to rotate). Then click enemy board to fire. Red = hit, Blue = miss. Sink all enemy ships to win!
tips: After a hit, fire adjacent cells to find ship direction
Remember the ship sizes to track what's left

zh.name: 战舰
zh.desc: 海军战争策略！部署舰队并猜测敌方位置。先击沉所有敌方战舰者获胜。经典猜测游戏的军事版！
zh.howToPlay: 首先在你的棋盘上放置战舰（点击放置，按钮旋转）。然后点击敌方棋盘开火。红色=命中，蓝色=未中。击沉所有敌方战舰获胜！
tips: 命中后，向相邻格子开火以找出战舰方向
以不可预测的模式放置战舰
记住战舰大小以追踪剩余战舰
